local agriculture schemes: Details of local agriculture schemes are published at https://agriculture.gov.in/schemes
pesticide subsidies: Information on pesticide subsidies available at https://agriculture.gov.in/pesticides
soil testing: Soil testing reports are publicly available at https://soilhealth.dac.gov.in/
crop insurance: Crop insurance details are available at https://pmfby.gov.in/
school infrastructure grants: School infrastructure funding details are available at https://education.gov.in/infrastructure
midday meal program: Midday meal scheme guidelines are published at https://mdm.nic.in/
water supply status: Water supply reports are available at https://jalshakti.gov.in/status
electricity outage reports: Outage and restoration timelines are posted at https://powermin.gov.in/outages
public transport schedules: Bus and train schedules are accessible at https://transport.maharashtra.gov.in/schedules
health center availability: Primary health center availability is listed at https://nhm.gov.in/centers
vaccination coverage: Vaccination statistics are published at https://mohfw.gov.in/vaccination
employment guarantee scheme: MGNREGA job card and work details are available at https://nrega.nic.in/
land ownership records: Land records are accessible via https://bhulekh.maharashtra.gov.in/
property tax rates: Municipal property tax rates are published at https://mahadit.gov.in/property-tax
waste management schedule: Garbage collection schedules are posted at https://pmc.gov.in/waste-management
